ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java ns soap http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/ ns cer http://mtis.ua.es/elearning/certificates --- { studentId: (payload.soap#Envelope.soap#Body.cer#generateCertificateRequest.cer#studentId) as String, courseId: (payload.soap#Envelope.soap#Body.cer#generateCertificateRequest.cer#courseId) as String, finalGrade: (payload.soap#Envelope.soap#Body.cer#generateCertificateRequest.cer#finalGrade) as Number, /* Validamos que el campo cumple xs:date y lo normalizamos como String "yyyy-MM-dd" para insertarlo en MySQL (columna DATE). */ completionDate: ((payload.soap#Envelope.soap#Body.cer#generateCertificateRequest.cer#completionDate) as Date { format: "yyyy-MM-dd" }) as String { format: "yyyy-MM-dd" }, requestId: (payload.soap#Envelope.soap#Body.cer#generateCertificateRequest.cer#requestId default "") as String }

logger.message: #["[generateCertificate] studentId=" ++ vars.req.studentId ++ " courseId=" ++ vars.req.courseId ++ " grade=" ++ (vars.req.finalGrade as String) ++ " reqId=" ++ vars.req.requestId]

db:select.doc:name: Check idempotency
db:select.db:sql: SELECT certificate_id, student_id, course_id, status, issue_date, repository_reference FROM certificates WHERE request_id = :requestId AND request_id <> '' LIMIT 1

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT certificate
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO certificates (certificate_id, student_id, course_id, final_grade, completion_date, issue_date, repository_reference, status, request_id) VALUES (:certificateId, :studentId, :courseId, :finalGrade, :completionDate, :issueDate, :repositoryReference, 'GENERATED', :requestId)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ certificateId: vars.newCert.certificateId, studentId: vars.req.studentId, courseId: vars.req.courseId, finalGrade: vars.req.finalGrade, completionDate: vars.req.completionDate, issueDate: vars.newCert.issueDate, repositoryReference: vars.newCert.repositoryReference, requestId: vars.req.requestId }]

http:request.doc:name: POST /notifications/certificate
http:request.http:body: #[output application/json --- { userId: vars.req.studentId, certificateId: vars.newCert.certificateId, email: vars.req.studentId ++ "@alu.ua.es" }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java ns soap http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/ ns cer http://mtis.ua.es/elearning/certificates --- (payload.soap#Envelope.soap#Body.cer#getCertificateRequest.cer#certificateId) as String

db:select.doc:name: SELECT certificate
db:select.db:sql: SELECT certificate_id, student_id, course_id, final_grade, completion_date, issue_date, status, repository_reference FROM certificates WHERE certificate_id = :certificateId LIMIT 1
